caption: A young man with dark, curly hair and a short beard is seated in front of a dark background featuring diagonal, bright purple light streaks. He is wearing a crisp, white long-sleeved button-down shirt and has a thin, flesh-colored headset microphone positioned along his jawline. In the beginning, he is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. As the sequence progresses, he transitions from a speaking expression into a broad smile, showing his teeth. His posture remains relatively still, though his facial expressions shift from active conversation to amusement. The lighting remains consistent throughout, highlighting the contrast between his white shirt and the deep purple and black tones of the stage background. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
